name: Strawberry Daiquiri (frozen)
description: A frozen strawberry daiquiri made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime juice, simple syrup, strawberries, and crushed ice. Bring on the summertime vibes with a Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri, a sweeter take on the traditional daiquiri cocktail.
recipe_steps: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Add 1 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms.
Serve in individual coupettes or tall cocktail glasses.
searchable_text: Strawberry Daiquiri (frozen) main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum A frozen strawberry daiquiri made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime juice, simple syrup, strawberries, and crushed ice. Bring on the summertime vibes with a Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri, a sweeter take on the traditional daiquiri cocktail. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 25 ml fresh lime juice, 25 ml simple syrup (1:1), 6 strawberries, 1 cup(s) crushed ice, as garnish single strawberry recipe steps Combine all ingredients in a blender. Add 1 cup of crushed ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms. Serve in individual coupettes or tall cocktail glasses. Garnish with a single strawberry.
